title: Lai Siangtho beel in Ka Nau Aw

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hankhuk lamah khualzin a na paipai lai-in,
Kong deihsak khat om, nasep ding tawh kisai
Tua thupha kong gen lai-in limtak na ngai in,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lai Siangtho beel in ka nau aw,
Lai Siangtho beel in ka nau
Hih hun le sih hunah, na dang teng sangin,
Lai Siangtho beel in ka nau

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Kamsiatna, dahna, kahna, thuak khata lecin,
Satan tawh kum tampi kidodo ta
Limtak thu zui-in lau ke’n, mainawt tawntung in.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Na sim sialin thu thak khat thei khia den niteh,
Topa le vantung le nangma tung thuman veh,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Tua laibu khuavak le upna sikkawipi hi,
Hong sawlna bang mang lecin, na maan den ding hi,
